exports.handler = async function(event) {
  const COC_API_KEY = 'eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzUxMiIsImtpZCI6IjI4YTMxOGY3LTAwMDAtYTFlYi03ZmExLTJjNzQzM2M2Y2NhNSJ9..CADyZpiUFq6MvA45fre0QZdW8axGei6d-Dq2u6TrBir0UHgXFIBSd922e1cQe1IlQODak341gGYuIaiUK5NCkQ';
  const CLAN_TAG = '%232GYPGPJP9';
  const endpoint = event.path.replace('/.netlify/functions/coc', '');

  const cocURL = `https://api.clashofclans.com/v1/clans/${CLAN_TAG}${endpoint}`;

  const response = await fetch(cocURL, {
    headers: {
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${COC_API_KEY}`,
      'Accept': 'application/json'
    }
  });

  const data = await response.json();

  return {
    statusCode: 200,
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(data)
  };
};
